title: aregelia cyanea
intro: Aregelia cyanea, also known as Aerva lanata, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, this plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aregelia cyanea include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Aregelia cyanea include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
